title: VimFu — zr zm Fold Level
description: zr increases the fold level by one, opening one more level of folds. zm decreases it, closing one level.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file with nested classes
Launch nvim with indent folds all closed

steps.say: Z R increases the fold level by one, opening the next layer of folds. Z M decreases it, closing a layer.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: zr to open one level ---

steps.say: Everything is folded. Z R to open one level.
The class bodies are visible. But method bodies are still folded. One more Z R.
Everything is open now. Two levels of folds.

steps.comment: --- Demo 2: zm to close one level ---

steps.say: Z M closes one level at a time.
Method bodies folded. Class bodies still visible.
All folded again. Z R and Z M let you control how deep you see into the code.
Z R opens a level. Z M closes a level. Peel back the layers one at a time.
